prior_manifest_audit.summary: The prior draft was created before commit 145a34c imported frontier notes v4.5-v5.3 and the DS(k,1) leaf-local checker. Its DS(k,1) status is therefore stale: it treated DS(k,1) as finite coarea evidence/conjectural outside the older v1 data. Current repo evidence makes reports/frontier_note_v5_3_dsk1_h1_exactness_2026_05_17.md the canonical theorem-level project artifact for internal connected-first-hit H1 depth exactness on DS(k,1) for every k >= 1.

recommended_v5_4_inputs: Lead with the status correction: v5.3 is now the canonical checked-in theorem-level DS(k,1) artifact.
State DS(k,1) exactly as internal connected-first-hit H1 depth exactness for every k >= 1.

Summarize the v5.3 architecture: fixed-right atoms, pure-star coarea split, slope-chain/Monge transport, three-cap basis, residual decomposition, leaf-local cap certificate, and Theorem 10.3 finite convex average.
Carry v4.5 as baseline: pure-star H1/H2/Hk depth exactness, U(7,3) H1 failure for spiders/max-degree-3, and the 4-leaf full-z obstruction that is not a depth obstruction.
Present DS(2,2) and DS(3,2)/DS(4,2) as finite certificate lanes only, with exact checked universes.
Present public-LP artifacts as obstruction/correction work, not closure.
Put list-update/OpenEvolve in a separate side-lane section or appendix.
Include the verification-command appendix, including the sympy dependency note for the DS(k,1) checker.
